heading: Tuesday Night
text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of an early shower or thunderstorm far south, then slight chance north, mainly after midnight. Lows in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast and in the Adirondacks. South to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of a shower or storm in the south; chance of mainly morning showers north. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s north, and mid 70s to lower 80s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, and becoming west.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Slight chance of an evening shower south. Lows from the upper 30s to mid 40s, with some upper 40s far south. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph early.
